def solve(n, edges)
    parent = Array.new(n) { |i| i }
    # parity[i]: parity of path weight from node i to its current root (mod 2)
    parity = Array.new(n, 0)

    # Helper function: find root with path compression and parity update
    # Using a recursive lambda ensures we capture parent/parity arrays correctly.
    find = lambda do |i|
        if parent[i] == i
            return i
        end
        
        old_parent = parent[i]
        
        # Recursively find the ultimate root
        root = find.call(old_parent)
        
        # Update parity[i]: 
        # New parity = (original parity i -> old_parent) + (parity old_parent -> root) mod 2
        parity[i] = (parity[i] + parity[old_parent]) % 2
        
        # Path compression
        parent[i] = root
        
        root
    end

    added_edges_count = 0

    edges.each do |edge|
        u, v, w = edge[0], edge[1], edge[2]

        # Find roots and ensure parities are relative to the current roots
        rootU = find.call(u)
        rootV = find.call(v)
        
        # pU = P(u -> rootU), pV = P(v -> rootV)
        pU = parity[u] 
        pV = parity[v]
        
        if rootU == rootV
            # Case 1: Cycle formed. Check cycle parity.
            # Cycle parity = (pU + pV + w) mod 2.
            
            cycle_parity = (pU + pV + w) % 2
            
            if cycle_parity == 0
                # Even cycle, accept the edge
                added_edges_count += 1
            end
            
        else
            # Case 2: Different components. Merge them (Union).
            
            # Merge rootU into rootV 
            parent[rootU] = rootV
            
            # Calculate parity[rootU] = P(rootU -> rootV) mod 2
            # Path: rootU -> u --w--> v -> rootV
            # P(rootU -> rootV) = pU + w + pV (mod 2)
            
            parity[rootU] = (pU + w + pV) % 2
            
            added_edges_count += 1
        end
    end

    added_edges_count
end

def solve(n, edges)
    # DSU structure initialization
    # parent[i]: parent of node i
    parent = Array.new(n) { |i| i }
    # parity[i]: parity of path weight from node i to its current root (mod 2)
    parity = Array.new(n, 0) 

    # Find operation with path compression and parity update
    find = lambda do |i|
        if parent[i] == i
            return i
        end
        
        # Recursively find the ultimate root
        root = find.call(parent[i])
        
        # Update parity[i]: 
        # New parity = (old parity[i] + parity[parent[i]] after compression) % 2
        parity[i] = (parity[i] + parity[parent[i]]) % 2
        
        # Path compression
        parent[i] = root
        
        return root
    end

    added_edges_count = 0

    edges.each do |edge|
        u, v, w = edge[0], edge[1], edge[2]

        # Find roots and update parities
        rootU = find.call(u)
        rootV = find.call(v)
        
        # pU = P(u -> rootU), pV = P(v -> rootV)
        pU = parity[u] 
        pV = parity[v]
        
        if rootU == rootV
            # Case 1: Cycle formed. Check cycle parity.
            # Cycle parity = (pU + pV + w) mod 2.
            
            cycle_parity = (pU + pV + w) % 2
            
            if cycle_parity == 0
                # Even cycle, accept the edge
                added_edges_count += 1
            end
            
        else
            # Case 2: Different components. Merge them (Union).
            
            # Merge rootU into rootV
            parent[rootU] = rootV
            
            # Calculate parity[rootU] = P(rootU -> rootV) mod 2
            # Path: rootU -> u --w--> v -> rootV
            # P(rootU -> u) = pU
            # P(v -> rootV) = pV
            # P(rootU -> rootV) = pU + w + pV (mod 2)
            
            parity[rootU] = (pU + w + pV) % 2
            
            added_edges_count += 1
        end
    end

    return added_edges_count
end
